title: After the Sprinters S.: My Stage

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Flower's running is awesome! And that speed!
She's nothing like how she was in the Japanese
Oaks!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe someone in her classic year ran so
well in the Sprinters Stakes... She's amazing!
Flower's the best sprinter there is!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: The best... sprinter!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I think there's a stage you'd shine even brighter
on.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: (You were right, Trainer...)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: (This is where I can shine at my brightest.)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
(If I can continue to make my mark here and leave
incredible accomplishments behind me...)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: (Then people will call you "the best trainer" too!)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Phew! I have to get faster!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Oh? Was that a declaration of rivalry I just
heard?!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Bakushin O! Zephyr!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I'm currently working on my speed. As long as I'm
fast enough, I can win at any distance!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
So if you're gonna keep working on your speed
into your senior year...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Then our relationship will go from mere class rep
and student to rivals! Actually, we already are
rivals!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I guess you're right!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Zephyr?

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
I thought this might happen. You two choose to
stand directly in the path of my wind.

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
As such, I shall become a tempest thats blasts
through any rival or wall in my way.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Thank you? I think?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
And then Bakushin O, Zephyr, and I promised to
race each other again!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While we walk home, Nishino Flower recounts the
aftermath of the race with a twinkle in her eye.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Mm-hmm! It was the best!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I was able to run with all my strength today
because you believed in me.
choice_data_list:
No, that was all you and your hard work,
Flower.

No, that was all you and your hard work,
Flower.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Well, I think the biggest factor that led to my performance was your hard work, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
The old me would have been absolutely
exhausted after running that race.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
But thanks to how carefully you've watched over
me, I'm perfectly fine. Which is why I...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I, um...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Oh, um! I want to keep doing my best in sprints
from here on out!
choice_data_list: Okay. Then let's take on the Sprint tour.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Currently, Daitaku Helios, a senior racer, is
dominating in sprints and miles. She'll be a tough
opponent to beat.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I hear she's planning on running in the Mile
Championship, and Yamanin Zephyr seems intent
on doing the same.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, Nishino Flower's performance today has
convinced me that sprints are where she can shine
most radiantly. And in that case...
choice_data_list:
Want to take on the Takamatsunomiya Kinen
next?

Want to take on the Takamatsunomiya Kinen
next?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Ooh, a G1 race? I'd love to!
choice_data_list:
Are you feeling more comfortable with G1
races?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Well, I still get nervous about them... But I also
get a lot more excited than I used to!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
You don't look scared about the idea either,
Trainer.
choice_data_list: Thanks for bearing with me till now...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Oh no, I'm not trying to tease you or anything!
Um...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I was just thinking about how much we've both
grown.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I'm looking forward to taking on a ton of races
with you in my senior year too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, we set our sights on the
Takamatsunomiya Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
"Germinating Seeds..." There, the sign looks
perfect.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Little poppies, I hope you'll bloom into beautiful
flowers when spring comes around.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I want to keep making Trainer proud, so I'll do my
best as well!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
(Phew... Today was such a great day. I feel like I'm
going to have wonderful dreams tonight. ♪)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Bourbon, is it all right if I turn off the lights?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Sound asleep right on time, just like
always. Good night.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Ouch!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Ow, my joints...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Maybe it's because I'm tired...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
(I have to rest up well so I can perform at my best
in the Takamatsunomiya Kinen!)
